label: Clamor
description: Defines a named type of sound event used by pawn hearing AI. Pawns within range of a clamor receive a HearClamor call carrying this def, and branch their alert response based on which ClamorDef was raised. Well-known types are Movement, Harm, Construction, Impact, Ability, and BabyCry.

new-clamor.label: New clamor type
new-clamor.description: Minimal clamor def. Only a defName is needed; all behavior is driven by code that branches on this def's identity.
